description: A reader should fail sync when the seed emits MANIFEST before establishing the session with HELLO.

assertions.description: Reader rejects MANIFEST because the seed did not establish the session with HELLO first.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the session-establishment violation.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with a session-establishment negative interop case for MANIFEST sequencing.
The seed still uses the normal peer-store transcript generator, but the harness injects MANIFEST before HELLO.
